title: Magma Ocean Evolution
description: We model the solidification of global magma oceans on rocky planets, tracking how heat, volatiles, and melting fronts interact over millions of years.

title: Atmosphere Formation
description: We simulate the outgassing and chemical evolution of early atmospheres, from steam worlds to potentially habitable environments.

title: Open-Source Tools
description: Our PROTEUS framework and its modules (SPIDER, JANUS, CALLIOPE, MORS) are open-source, enabling reproducible planetary science.
